# Diamond Dilemma manual verification file
# Tile #N = Jaap's sheet numbering. Edges: B=bottom, L=left, R=right (tile upright).
# Points 1..11 clockwise: B right->left, L bottom->top, R top->bottom.
# Point k is at fraction k/12 along the edge (corners are NOT points).
# Format: 'N: <B bits> <L bits> <R bits>'. Mark corrections by editing the line.
# GOLD lines. Source: Jaap's own data file (high trust) - verify anyway.

  1: 00100010000 00000010001 00010010000
  2: 00100000110 01000000000 00010000001
  3: 00000001000 00000010000 00000100100

  7: 00000000010 00000000010 00100010000
  8: 00100000001 00100001000 00000000101
